; --- globals ---
@.fmt.int_println = private unnamed_addr constant [4 x i8] c"%d\0A\00", align 1
@.str.0 = private unnamed_addr constant [6 x i8] c"hello\00", align 1
@.str.false = private unnamed_addr constant [6 x i8] c"false\00", align 1
@.str.true = private unnamed_addr constant [5 x i8] c"true\00", align 1

; --- declarations ---
declare i32 @printf(ptr, ...)
declare i32 @puts(ptr)

; --- definitions ---
; @main
define i32 @main() {
entry:
  %t0 = add i32 0, 42
  %t1 = add i32 0, 1
  call i32 (ptr, ...) @printf(ptr @.fmt.int_println, i32 %t0)
  call i32 @puts(ptr @.str.0)
  %t5 = trunc i32 %t1 to i1
  %t6 = select i1 %t5, ptr @.str.true, ptr @.str.false
  call i32 @puts(ptr %t6)
  ret i32 0
}
